title: AXNotificationOptions
description: Configuration options for creating and displaying notifications programmatically.

sections.title: Type Definition
sections.description: Complete interface definition for notification configuration options.

props.name: buttons
props.description: Optional array of action buttons to display in the notification.

props.name: icon
props.description: Optional icon class name to display in the notification. If not provided, a default icon based on color will be used.

props.name: title
props.description: Optional title text to display in the notification.

props.name: content
props.description: Content to display in the notification. Can be a string, template reference, or component type.

props.name: location
props.description: Position where the notification should appear on screen.

props.name: closeButton
props.description: Whether to show a close button. Defaults to true.

props.name: color
props.description: Color theme for the notification (primary, secondary, success, warning, danger, default).

props.name: timeOut
props.description: Duration in milliseconds before the notification automatically closes. If not set, uses global default.

props.name: timeOutProgress
props.description: Whether to show a progress bar indicating the remaining time. Defaults to true.

props.name: pauseOnHover
props.description: Whether to pause the timeout countdown when hovering over the notification. Defaults to true.
